abstract.text: App intent schemas you use for ebook reader functionality and content.

doc://com.apple.AppIntents/documentation.title: Making ebook actions available to Siri and Apple Intelligence

abstract.text: Create app intents and entities to integrate your app’s ebook and audiobook functionality with Siri and Apple Intelligence.
The app intent conforms to the schema for updating the spacing between words.
The content type.
The app intent conforms to the schema for updating settings for an ebook.
The app intent conforms to the schema for updating the font size.
Make your app’s actions and content available to Siri and Apple Intelligence with assistant schemas.
The relative change in word spacing for rendering a book.

The app intent conforms to the schema for opening an ebook.

The app intent conforms to the schema for playing an audiobook.

Let people complete tasks with voice commands, search, and other system experiences by integrating your app with Siri and Apple Intelligence.
